candidates.why: This is a separate operating D&A line, but it is not labelled as relating to Property Costs / cost of sales and does not clearly sit within the selected COGS bucket. To avoid misallocating a general operating D&A line to COGS, do not add it to COGS_DA.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is Property Costs. The only visible D&A row is a standalone operating line with no explicit COGS linkage, so it should not be added to COGS separately.

candidates.why: This is a standalone operating D&A line shown alongside Central administrative costs and Marketing costs, not as an indented subcomponent of either selected XSGA row. Relative to the selected XSGA bucket (Central administrative costs + Marketing costs), it appears separate and should be added later as XSGA-related D&A.

variables.notes: No R&D row is present and XRD is empty. The standalone operating D&A line appears outside the selected XSGA component rows, so it should be added separately to avoid omitting operating overhead D&A.
